permission_scope: Write behavior is governed by the user-selected Connector/Action mode: Auto, Ask Permission, Full Access, Read Only, or Disabled. Approval is required only when the selected mode or risk policy requires it. This record allows local/mock ConnectorHub continuation under that policy only; live provider permission scope must be reverified before final product release or live readiness claim.
provider_ref: local/mock ConnectorHub provider proof only; no live provider credential or external account is accepted by this record
provider_transcript_ref: reports/security/vs3-connectorhub-source-proof.json; final release requires a redacted live-provider transcript for the selected provider and permission mode
redaction_note: No raw secrets, provider credentials, private keys, session cookies, bearer tokens, live provider payloads, or unredacted external account data are included. This record captures the Connector/Action mode policy and local/mock proof only; live provider rehearsal remains required before final product release or live readiness claim.
